data.name: 我的皇家女僕R
data.detailed_description:
◆玩法

以培養與女僕星璃（CV：立花沙羅）好感度來推進遊戲，隨著好感度的Lv上升，會解鎖更多的場景、對話及功能。
觀察能夠看看女僕正在做甚麼，有時候也能得到有幫助的訊息。
好感度不會有任何下降懲罰，只有增加多寡，不用擔心任何壞事發生!

只要達到條件，可以隨時讓女僕為您切換衣服、髮型，H場景也會隨著好感度提升能夠及時改變更多表情! 差分自由選擇，數十至百種以上的搭配隨您喜好。

◆遊戲特色

◇ 全h場景皆為注重實用度的動畫
◇ H場景總共8個
◇ 無結局式輕鬆的同居SLG

◆問題回報及注意事項:

DLsite 為有馬賽克版本，steam 為無馬賽克版本。
兩者內容完全相同，購買前請先注意!!

data.short_description: 在一棟豪宅之中，長年熟悉的管家婆婆退休後找了一位新人女僕 星璃 來接替她的工作，至此你平淡無奇的生活開始多了不一樣的色彩，輕鬆又色色的同居故事由此展開。對，只要開開心心的跟女僕享受同居生活就好，色色都是被允許的，或許她比較慢熟又或許才是性格更色的那一方?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Royal Maid R
data.detailed_description:
◆How to play

The game is advanced by cultivating the favorability with the maid Seirei (CV: Sara Tachibana). As the favorability level increases, more scenes, dialogues and functions will be unlocked.
Observing can help you see what the maid is doing and sometimes provide helpful information.
There will be no penalty for the favorability to decrease, only an increase in favorability, so don't worry about anything bad happening!

As long as the conditions are met, you can ask the maid to change your clothes and hairstyle at any time, and the H scene will change more expressions in time as the favorability increases! You can freely choose the difference, and there are dozens to hundreds of combinations to suit your preferences.

◆Game Features

◇ All h scenes are animations that focus on practicality
◇ 8 H scenes in total
◇ Relaxed cohabitation SLG with no ending

◆Problem reporting and notes:

DLsite is the mosaic version, steam is the non-mosaic version.
The contents of both are exactly the same, please pay attention before purchasing!!

data.short_description: In a mansion, the housekeeper you've known for many years retired and found a new maid to take over her job. From then on, your ordinary life began to have a different color, and a relaxed and erotic cohabitation story unfolded...

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
